description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of sandals from enroute.  Pair it with any kind of western and ethnic wear, and look great both ways.This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.UpperLeather straps on the forefoot and along the midfoot length to form a toe separator, and a leather heel cup with a buckled ankle strap to lock the foot in placeLeather footbed for all day comfortOutsoleDurable textured TPU outsole, grooved on the back heel for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
